description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open-plan layout. The structure features a prominent glass-walled section along one side, likely serving as a sunroom or living area, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. The roof is flat, and the exterior walls are primarily white, with large windows and sliding glass doors enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The interior is visibly divided into distinct rooms, including a kitchen, bedrooms, and living spaces, with furniture and fixtures clearly arranged. The property includes a spacious patio area and a large green lawn, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, openness, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, extensive glass walls, and a spacious patio and lawn, featuring open-plan living and abundant natural light.
description_view_0: This view highlights the open-plan interior, glass-walled living area, and the transition from the patio to the green lawn.
description_view_1: The glass facade and sliding doors are prominent, showcasing the main living area and the connection to the outdoor lawn.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the rear and side of the bungalow, with visible room divisions and the patio extending around the building.
description_view_3: The back of the bungalow is shown, with fewer windows and a focus on the solid white exterior walls and patio space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows and glass facade
